failedAssertions.reason: Both month-end checklist endpoints returned HTTP 400 Invalid option 'PENDING' on a fresh tenant instead of returning/updating MonthEndChecklistDto data.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: POST /api/v1/inventory/opening-stock returned HTTP 409 because opening stock import is disabled in the compose runtime and docker-compose.yml does not pass the enabling toggle through to the app service.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented the reset-runtime manual user seeding workaround, maker-checker two-actor period-close flow, tenant-scoped super-admin reopen requirement, and the reproducible month-end checklist PENDING error.
